user.title: My Rail Commute - API Authentication
user.description:
Enter your Rail Data Marketplace API key. You can register for free at {signup_url}

Note: If you already have a commute configured, this step will be skipped automatically.

stations.title: Configure Route
stations.description: Select your origin station from the nearby stations list, or type a 3-letter CRS code directly (e.g., PAD for Paddington). Enable 'All Departures' to show every train from this station, or enter a destination CRS code to track a specific route.

data.destination: Destination Station (CRS Code) — leave blank if 'All Departures' is enabled

settings.title: Commute Settings
settings.description: Configure settings for your commute from {origin} to {destination}.

data.enable_recent_train_times: Enable Recent Train Times (requires a Network Rail Open Data account)

nrod_credentials.title: Network Rail Open Data Account
nrod_credentials.description:
Recent Train Times uses Network Rail's real-time train movement feed to show actual departure/arrival times. Register for a free account at {signup_url}, then enter your credentials below.

Note: If you already have Recent Train Times enabled on another commute, this step will be skipped automatically.

return_journey.title: Return Journey
return_journey.description: Would you also like to set up the return journey from {destination} to {origin}? It will use the same settings as this commute.

error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Please check your API key.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Rail API. Please try again later.
error.invalid_station: Invalid station code. Please use a valid 3-letter CRS code.
error.same_station: Origin and destination stations must be different.
error.invalid_thresholds: Delay thresholds must maintain hierarchy: Severe >= Major >= Minor >= 1 minute.
error.recent_train_times_needs_destination: Recent Train Times requires a fixed destination station and cannot be used with 'All Departures'.
error.invalid_nrod_auth: Authentication failed. Please check your Network Rail Open Data username and password.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

data.enable_recent_train_times: Enable Recent Train Times (requires a Network Rail Open Data account)
data.nrod_password: NROD Password (leave blank to keep the current one)

error.invalid_thresholds: Delay thresholds must maintain hierarchy: Severe >= Major >= Minor >= 1 minute.
error.recent_train_times_needs_destination: Recent Train Times requires a fixed destination station and cannot be used with 'All Departures'.
error.nrod_credentials_required: Enabling Recent Train Times requires both a Network Rail Open Data username and password.
